name: AdventHealth 400
comments: Kyle Larson won the AdventHealth 400 at Kansas Speedway, his 32nd NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: Nos. 6, 10, 19, 21, 54, 88, 38 (unapproved adjustments).
